data.body: CHECKPOINT 1/6: Inspected dso-setup.sh — line 491 references 'docs/INSTALL.md'. Existing test file tests/scripts/test-dso-setup.sh uses behavioral patterns (runs script, asserts on captured output). Will append new behavioral test at end of file that runs the script, captures stdout+stderr, and asserts the old 'docs/INSTALL.md' path is absent.
